project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Business operating system for solo technical founders — memory-powered AI agent across Slack, email, calendar, Drive, meetings, and Claude Code

F.name: Security Hardening
F.notes: Training wheels removed (was blocking tools). Pre-tool security checks + output sanitization remain.

L.name: Autonomous Task Queue
L.notes: Scheduler, executor, dedicated task channel with pinned messages, cross-channel management, three-tier routing (Sonnet/Opus API/Opus CLI), MCP integration, 26 tests.

infrastructure.local: macOS, DATABASE_URL=... npx tsx src/cli/index.ts start
infrastructure.maxPlan: Claude Max subscription — deep path costs $0

immediateBacklog.title: Further memory debugging — agent sometimes claims no data when data exists
Slack task UX tweaks — thumbs up approval, detail thread edits, pin summary regeneration
--session support for deep path thread continuity across Slack messages

backlog.title: Complex long-term task management — multi-step workflows with checkpointing

currentSprint.name: Autonomous Task Queue + Three-Tier Routing
goals: Task queue schema, store, CRUD tools ✅
Dedicated task channel with pinned messages ✅
Detail thread under each task pin ✅
Three-tier routing: FAST (Sonnet) / MEDIUM (Opus API) / DEEP (Opus CLI) ✅

lastSession.type: Postgres migration + Task queue + Three-tier routing + Bug fixes
keyDecisions: SQLite → Postgres (33 files, triggered by data loss)
Three-tier routing: FAST/MEDIUM/DEEP (reduces hallucinations on memory-heavy queries)
Autonomous task queue with dedicated Slack channel
Pinned messages = live dashboard, channel messages = notifications, threads = modifications
Training wheels removed (was blocking internal tools like delete_memory)
tsvector search switched from AND to OR logic
Preflight prompt: never imply starting without [PROCEED]
Task results posted to task channel, not owner DM

thingsNotToRedo: DON'T REBUILD WHAT COMES NATIVELY WITH CLAUDE
Don't hardcode prompts in TypeScript — all prompts in config/prompts/*.md
Don't hardcode tunables in TypeScript — all operational values in config/default.json
Always take the pain now — build for durability, no short-term hacks
Bug reports → investigate + plan + confirm before coding
MCP stdio servers MUST redirect ALL logging to stderr
Deep path subprocess env: ALLOWLIST only, never pass Slack tokens
Findings file step is NOT optional — web research that isn't written is lost
Pre-flight must never imply starting without [PROCEED] sentinel
Brain reaction goes on user's message, not bot's confirmation
Long Slack messages MUST be chunked — msg_too_long silently drops content
Always notify user in Slack on errors — no silent failures
tsvector plainto_tsquery uses AND — use to_tsquery with | for OR
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS won't add new columns — ALTER TABLE for live migrations
NEVER run tests against production DATABASE_URL — use TEST_DATABASE_URL
